data.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): Contract doc must also specify the INPUT schema (what the evaluator receives from the orchestrator): the TEST_RESULT:rejected payload from red-test-writer-output.md PLUS orchestrator context envelope (task_id, story_id, epic_id, task_description, in_progress_tasks, closed_tasks). REVISE impact_assessment field schema must be detailed: affected_tasks as array of {task_id, impact_type: rerun|modify|invalidate}, not just a text field.
